rendered_via: Blender MCP socket execute_code on port 9876

root_cause.leg_issue: Atlas projection put black sock/short/side-shadow pixels into exposed leg areas. Earlier cleanup used narrow x columns and missed side surfaces.
root_cause.neck_cheek_issue: Wider neck cleanup painted hoodie/chest as skin. V5 keeps the neck window narrow and front-depth gated, while using a whole exposed-leg z band between shorts and sock/boot.

notes: Best current visual cleanup candidate. It reduces black exposed-leg artifacts and avoids the v2 skin patch on hoodie/chest, but it is still not production-integrated pending owner review.
